name: project-intelligence
description: Project-level intelligence for intake, specs, plans, standards, knowledge, graph context, systematic debugging, orchestration, finish gates, lifecycle maintenance, and reuse guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Project intake, specs, standards, graph context, finish gates, maintenance, and review checks.
interface.longDescription: Project Intelligence maintains a repository-local .project-intel knowledge base for requirement intake, specs, plans, standards, reusable frontend/backend patterns, optional GitNexus and Understand-Anything graph context, systematic debugging, task orchestration, finish gates, quality checks, code review workflows, and post-task maintenance. Init detects optional graph tools without blocking noninteractive agents, while intake/lifecycle print by default and finish/maintain keep stable outputs.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repository's standards, knowledge, tooling, and graph context.
Implement this requirement using intake, project standards, reuse, impact analysis, finish, and maintenance.
Investigate or review this change with project context, hard rules, and quality checks.
